_comment: Explicit v2 label semantics vs the baked v1 map, plus documented resolutions of every curated entry whose `primary` field held an instruction instead of a category. Authoritative tag->category values remain final_tag_map_v1.json except where changed here.

topic_changes._rule: All tags with prim_cat=='Iran' in final_tag_map_v1.json vote 'Geopolitics' for the topic column in v2. The v1 Iran tag-precedence (any %Iran% tag forces category Iran) is REMOVED for topic.

event_family_rules._rule: event_family is a separate column derived from tag clusters; a market can be topic=Geopolitics AND event_family=Iran.

precedence_retained.Mentions: Mentions tag -> category Mentions (user-confirmed: a coherent market type); mechanic='mentions' also set.

Big Tech.curated_note: down-weight vs Finance for valuation questions

Fed.curated_note: Politics in nomination context; notes argued Economy for rate decisions

USA Election.curated_note: auto top_cat Mentions was a volume artifact

Iran.curated_note: US-Iran conflict = Geopolitics; the Iran EVENT FAMILY is a v2 column, not a topic

Los Angeles.curated_note: corrected from Weather: samples are LA/California politics

abstain.margin_rule: abstain=true when top-2 vote score ratio < 1.25 or only auto-mapped (uncurated) tags voted
abstain.note: threshold to be calibrated in the labels-v2 bake against the known-ambiguous validation set
